message:
test(budget): add 60 edge-case tests for PID controller, E-process bounds, degradation hysteresis (bd-1x69n)

Coverage: negative integral windup, zero gains, large error stability,
alternating error derivative, sigma EMA decay boundaries (0.0/1.0),
E-value clamping at 1e-10/1e10, frames_observed saturation at u32::MAX,
DegradationLevel widget queries for all 6 levels, PartialOrd/Hash/Default
traits, BudgetController accessor methods, RenderBudget phase budget clamping,
record_frame_time integration, exhausted with allow_frame_skip=false,
BudgetDecision/Phase/BudgetTelemetry trait coverage. Total: 144 budget tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
